title: stelis triseta
intro: Stelis triseta, also known as the Small Yellow Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of these conditions, such as pain, swelling, and infection. Stelis triseta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
